snippet.title: GODZILLA MINUS ZERO | First Look Teaser
snippet.description:
GODZILLA MINUS ZERO
VFX, Written, and Directed by Takashi Yamazaki
In theatres November 6
Follow @godzilla_toho and @GKIDSfilms for more updates!
godzillaminuszero.com

GODZILLA MINUS ZERO picks up in 1949, two years after the tumultuous events of Godzilla Minus One, and continues the story of the Shikishima family as they face an all-new calamity. Additionally confirmed out of CinemaCon, Ryunosuke Kamiki, the hero who faced Godzilla’s terror in Godzilla Minus One, returns as Koichi Shikishima, and is joined by Minami Hamabe as Noriko Oishi, who miraculously survived Godzilla’s first attack on Tokyo.

As a project Filmed For IMAX, GODZILLA MINUS ZERO was shot with high-definition digital cameras certified by IMAX, and optimized in sound and imagery unique to IMAX screens. Fans can look forward to seeing Godzilla presented to all new terrifying heights, making GODZILLA MINUS ZERO in a true cinematic event not to be missed.

Godzilla Store: https://godzilla.com/collections/all

For more information regarding Godzilla, check out our other channels:

https://godzilla.com/blogs/news

snippet.title: KEEP BRAWL ALIVE!
snippet.description:
Get a free Buffie, the Royale Trunk skin and more, but you gotta KEEP BRAWL ALIVE! 😱

❤️‍🔥 Complete your 6 daily wins every day to fill the track bar! The more players complete them, the better the rewards for the whole community!
❤️‍🔥 This means the only way to keep progressing is to tell your friends to do the same!
❤️‍🔥 Throughout the whole event, there’ll be 2 guaranteed Chaos Drops at the end of your daily wins (to encourage the non-believers!)
❤️‍🔥 There’s also an extra Chaos Drop every day if the community completes a daily social task, look for them daily on the community event screen!
❤️‍🔥 FIRST DAILY SOCIAL TASK: Go to your favorite content creator channel and comment something nice! If 100 Creators respond, everyone will get a Chaos Drop the next day!

💥 REWARDS 💥
• Chaos Drops
• Power Points
• Gems
• Royale Trunk Skin
• Starr Drops
• Random Buffie
• XP Doubler
• Bling
• PPXP
• Trophy Box
• 2 Chaos Drops every day from the Daily Wins
• Extra Chaos Drops every day from the social tasks

Everyone who does their daily social task will also participate in our daily Gem giveaway! We’ll go through all the players who have done the task and 1 random lucky winner will get ONE HUNDRED THOUSAND Gems! There’ll be a different winner every day, so do the tasks!

The event starts TODAY and ends on April 24th at 8:00 AM UTC, so... LET'S #KEEPBRAWLALIVE! 🤘

snippet.title: Black Cat: The Master Thief| Character Reveal Trailer | Marvel Rivals
snippet.description:
Cross her path and your luck runs out! 🍀

One of the world's premier thieves, Felicia Hardy glides across the battlefield with swift precision and a dancer's grace, ever ready to purloin an opponent's fortune. Those who meet the Black Cat's gaze should beware, as her omens never miss their mark!

Felicia Hardy is one of the most notorious thieves in the world. Once the Black Cat has her eyes on a prize, it's already as good as gone. This is one feline femme fatale you don't want to cross... because luck is always on her side!

The Black Cat was recruited by Wilson Fisk to infiltrate Doctor Strange's Sanctum Sanctorum and steal the Tablet of Life and Time. However, while Kingpin sought to harness its ancient power to counter Alchemax by making a deal with the Gilded Saint, she hatched a plan of her own to free his captives. Let the double cross commence!

Season 7.5 arrives on April 17, 2026

Keep your eyes on the prize, because this cat always lands on her feet.

snippet.title: Manelele Viitorului - ETE NA (Official Video)
snippet.description:
😎🔥 Manelele Viitorului – ETE NA (Official Video)

Cand lumea vorbeste… tu dai mai tare volumul!
„ETE NA” este piesa de atitudine pura, pentru toti cei care au fost judecati, vorbiti si subestimati… dar au mers mai departe.

🎶 Refrenul „Ete na, ce ai tu cu viata mea” este raspunsul perfect pentru toti cei care comenteaza fara sa stie prin ce ai trecut.

💥 O manea moderna cu vibe de balans si energie de club, care transmite un mesaj clar:
👉 nu te schimbi pentru nimeni
👉 nu dai explicatii
👉 faci ce vrei cu viata ta

🔥 Versurile spun realitatea:
cand esti jos, pleaca toti
cand urci, apare toata lumea

💭 Nu e doar o piesa… e o stare.
Un mesaj pentru cei care au invatat pe pielea lor ca bunatatea fara limite te costa.

📲 Scrie in comentarii:
👉 „Ete na!” daca si tu ai trecut prin asta 😎

🔔 Aboneaza-te la Manelele Viitorului pentru cele mai puternice hituri din 2026!

snippet.title: Season 2: Summit Official Trailer | Overwatch
snippet.description:
The fight for a better future pushes even higher during Season 2: Summit.

Our newest Damage Hero is here with the arrival of Sierra. As Head of Security for Watchpoint: Grand Mesa, Sierra takes pride in protecting those around her, and she does so with an arsenal built for controlling spaces, high and low.

Post-Match Accolades are back, giving you the ability to vote for a match’s MVP. And that’s not the only thing returning! Antarctic Peninsula is also back with new pathways and sightlines to help you in battle.

New Battle Pass and Shop skins are also arriving like the new Spring Fairy skins, Panda Jetpack Cat skin, Sakura Bundle, and the new Season 2 Mythics for both Genji and Soldier: 76.

And that’s just the beginning! Enjoy our newest arrival to Stadium with Ramattra, and Jetpack Cat, the start of Overwatch’s 10 Year Anniversary, our latest collaboration and more coming midseason.

It all starts TOMORROW in Overwatch Season 2: Summit.

Overwatch is free to play on PC and console, including Nintendo Switch™ 2

snippet.title: INSIDIOUS: OUT OF THE FURTHER - Official Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
The Further comes for our world. 
Watch the official trailer for #Insidious: Out Of The Further - exclusively in theatres this August.


Follow us on social: 
https://www.instagram.com/InsidiousMovie   
https://twitter.com/InsidiousMovie  
https://www.facebook.com/InsidiousMovie  

Visit our site: https://insidious.movie 
Subscribe for more exclusive content: https://www.youtube.com/sonypictures 

Having earned over $740 million at the global box office, the Insidious franchise returns with a new family and a terror that redefines what The Further is capable of.
 
In Insidious: Out of the Further, Amelia Eve stars as Gemma, a young mother raising her daughter in the house she grew up in who discovers she can travel into The Further, the purgatorial realm of lost souls at the heart of the Insidious universe. When something evil comes after her, Gemma discovers an ability that changes everything: she doesn’t just enter The Further, she can bring what lives there back to the real world. Once the demons realize her power, our world becomes their playground.
 
With Lin Shaye reprising her iconic role as Elise Rainier and Jacob Chase (Come Play) directing, Insidious: Out of the Further opens August 21, 2026. Screenplay by Jacob Chase. Story by David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick and Jacob Chase.
